creator: benlutz@datacomm.ch
text:
On 01/08/2013 06:40 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of games/uqm,
>
> Please note that PR ports/175141 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/175141
>

Unfortunately I don't have a desktop FreeBSD system with which to test 
the patch at the moment. I therefore approve the patch by default.

Regards,
Benjamin
